MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
George S. Wynns, of Law Office of George S. Wynns, Tel. 415.279.7397, for appellant/defendant Jennifer Nushwat;
No other appearances.

This case comes on calendar regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

The matter is taken off calendar. The case has been consolidated with CGC-18-571523, for all purposes. A case management conference remains set for hearing on April 24, 2019, at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 610.
